description: Shapiro-Wilk normality test on one numeric column of a CSV (+ Q-Q/histogram figure).
rules: read-only — input CSV is never mutated
tests a single numeric column with the Shapiro-Wilk test
JSON report + PNG figure written to record_store
usage: Set DATA_CSV, VALUE_COL, and optionally ALPHA (default 0.05). Output: normality.json + normality.png.
limitation: Single column only; NaNs dropped. Shapiro-Wilk is unreliable for n < 3 or very large n. Requires numpy/scipy/pandas/matplotlib present; degrades to an empty report otherwise.
